activeRepositoryJudgmentTitle: Resolve Architectural Risk: Client persists 4 distinct state write(s) to localStorage. Browse

candidates.title: Implement Focused Improvement Loop UX
candidates.evidence: docs/repository-improvement-product-redesign.md — explicit product vision: "Open Agent IDE → see the next best improvement → generate one prompt → implement → validate → refresh → repeat"
candidates.whyItMatters: Transforms Agent IDE from a repository-intelligence browser into a focused improvement operating system. Every user visit answers one question: what is the single highest-impact improvement and what happens next?
candidates.whyOutranks: Addresses the primary user journey end-to-end. All other product opportunities are components or downstream effects of this loop.

candidates.title: Auto-compose Single Implementation Prompt from All Intelligence
candidates.evidence: docs/repository-improvement-product-redesign.md — "Agent IDE composes one complete implementation prompt from all internal intelligence."
candidates.whyItMatters: Users never need to know what a context package, builder prompt, or architect prompt is. One complete prompt encapsulates all intelligence needed to execute the improvement.
candidates.whyOutranks: Directly reduces the cognitive burden of the improvement loop. Lower-ranked candidates improve subsystems rather than the central user interaction.

candidates.title: Collapse Primary Navigation to Improvement Loop Only
candidates.evidence: docs/repository-improvement-product-redesign.md — "Screens that should be removed from normal usage" and "UI elements that should become Advanced"
candidates.whyItMatters: Eliminates decision fatigue. The owner sees one recommendation, one rationale, one button. Repository Health, Context Package, Validation, Verification, and Prompt Center move to Advanced.
candidates.whyOutranks: Reducing navigation complexity has higher product leverage than adding features to existing surfaces.

candidates.title: Automate Post-Implementation Validation and Refresh
candidates.evidence: docs/repository-improvement-product-redesign.md — "Validation & Refresh — automatically handle the post-implementation loop"
candidates.whyItMatters: After implementation, the owner clicks one button. Validation, refresh, and next-improvement selection happen automatically. The loop closes without manual steps.
candidates.whyOutranks: Automates the most repetitive part of the improvement loop. Backlog-only items below this threshold do not change the core loop.
